_comment: MCP server registry for GitHub Copilot CLI and VS Code.
To use: merge the 'mcpServers' entry below into your existing config.
For the Fabric Data Agent URL, create a Data Agent in Microsoft Fabric,
enable its MCP endpoint (Settings → Model Context Protocol), and paste
Web research and SharePoint document retrieval are handled by Copilot CLI's
built-in tools (web_search, web_fetch, SharePoint/OneDrive MCP). No custom
MCP servers are needed for those capabilities.
See src/cli/README.md for full setup instructions.

wwi-sales-data.description: Wide World Importers sales data via Fabric Data Agent
